guidelines.title: Attendance Policy
guidelines.body: A minimum of 75% attendance is required in every subject to be eligible to sit for semester exams.

guidelines.title: Code of Conduct
guidelines.body: Students are expected to maintain discipline, punctuality, and respect towards faculty and peers on campus.

guidelines.title: Examination Guidelines
guidelines.body: Carry your ID card to every exam. Electronic devices are not permitted inside the examination hall.
